name: Ichiyoshi Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Ichiyoshi Securities Co., Ltd. operates in the securities industry in Japan. The company conducts research and gathers information on stocks of small- and medium-sized growth companies. It also provides discretionary investment and advisory services for institutional investors and trusts. In addition, the company is involved in the real estate renting, broking, and management services; sale of office supplies and goods; and insurance agency activities. Ichiyoshi Securities Co., Ltd. was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
